name: @chainward/elizaos-plugin
description: ChainWard plugin for elizaOS — real-time monitoring & alerts for AI agent wallets on Base

CHAINWARD_API_KEY.description: ChainWard API key (ag_ prefix). Generate at chainward.ai/settings.

CHAINWARD_BASE_URL.description: ChainWard API base URL. Defaults to https://api.chainward.ai.

CHAINWARD_AGENT_WALLET.description: Agent wallet address to auto-register on startup. If omitted, the plugin reads from the runtime wallet provider.

CHAINWARD_AGENT_NAME.description: Display name for the auto-registered agent.
